description: Perform a daily financial reconciliation workflow. Using the patient details found in ~/Desktop/payer_info.txt, log in to LibreHealth EHR (admin/password) and record a $40.00 cash payment (Type: Copay or Unapplied/On-Account) for today's date. Generate the Daily Report PDF for today and save it to ~/Desktop/day_sheet.pdf. The report must reflect the recorded transaction.
